problem.title: SuMa on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does SuMa perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser surfels and a shorter history window for faster dense mapping.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer surfels and a longer history window for a denser dense-mapping solve.
